source_intent.raw_intent: Case 053: I am a agency_owner in United Kingdom. Build a srx_agent for memory_engrave using the runtime_lens. Chaos input type is language_mixed_prompt. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build an SRX agent that performs memory engrave operations for a UK agency owner, processing chaotic language-mixed prompts into structured, governed memory artifacts. Scope: - The agent shall accept language_mixed_prompt inputs, extract and normalize intent, apply validation gates, and produce a memory_engrave artifact compliant with SR8 compilation requirements. Constraints: - Must operate under UK data protection regulations (GDPR/DPA 2018). - Input may be missing context, contain urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. - Output must include explicit validation gates and be structured for SR8 compilation. - Runtime lens must enforce governance and auditability. Success Criteria: - Agent correctly parses and normalizes chaotic mixed-language input. - Generated memory_engrave artifact contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections. - Validation gates are present and documented. - Artifact passes SR8 compilation without errors. Output Contract: - format: JSON - sections: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent - compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object
